summary: Tested Admin Dashboard overhaul with Quick Actions, Live Widgets, Global Search, and AI Chat Assistant. All new features are working correctly on both desktop and mobile views.

quick_actions_bar.evidence: All 5 Quick Action buttons found and functional: Auktionen (green), Bots Start (blue), Bots Stop (red), AOTD (yellow), Refresh (purple). Create Auctions modal opens correctly with count selection (5, 10, 20, 50).

live_widgets.evidence: All 4 Live Widgets displayed correctly: Heute (Revenue €0.00), Aktiv (11 auctions), Online (50+ users with pulse indicator), Gebote/h (bids per hour). Widgets update on refresh.

global_search_button.evidence: Search button with data-testid='global-search-btn' opens Global Search modal. Search shows results with category tabs (Alle, Benutzer, Auktionen, Produkte) and displays user/product results correctly.

global_search_keyboard_shortcut.evidence: '/' keyboard shortcut opens Global Search modal when not focused on input field. Escape key closes the modal.

ai_chat_keyboard_shortcut.evidence: Ctrl+J keyboard shortcut toggles AI Chat assistant. Escape key closes the chat.

ai_chat_bot_icon.evidence: Purple bot icon at bottom-right opens AI Chat. Chat displays welcome message with example commands. Messages can be sent and responses received.

ai_chat_commands.evidence: AI Chat responds to commands. Shows 'Zeige Statistiken' button for valid commands. Provides helpful suggestions for unrecognized commands.

mobile_responsiveness.evidence: Mobile view (390x844) displays correctly: Quick Actions show icons only (no labels), Live Widgets in 2x2 grid, stats cards stacked vertically, AI Chat bot icon visible and functional.

escape_key_closes_modals.evidence: Escape key correctly closes Global Search modal, AI Chat, and mobile menu.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminQuickActions.js: Well-structured component with proper state management for loading states and modal visibility
AdminLiveWidgets.js: Good use of pulse animation for 'Online' indicator to show real-time status
AdminGlobalSearch.js: Proper debounced search (300ms) with category filtering and keyboard navigation hints
AdminAIChat.js: Good UX with confirmation buttons for destructive actions and minimize/maximize functionality
Admin.js: Keyboard shortcuts properly implemented with event listener cleanup in useEffect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard overhaul complete and tested. New features: 1) Quick Actions Bar with 5 buttons (Auktionen, Bots Start/Stop, AOTD, Refresh), 2) Live Widgets showing real-time stats (Revenue, Active Auctions, Online Users, Bids/hour), 3) Global Search with '/' shortcut and category filtering, 4) AI Chat with Ctrl+J shortcut. All keyboard shortcuts working: '/' for search, Ctrl+J for AI Chat, Escape to close modals. Mobile responsive design verified.
